steps.title: Find the shared research focus
steps.content: Both texts discuss Norse settlers in Greenland and why they left the region. Text 1 emphasizes increasingly lower temperatures, while Text 2 argues drought played the more important role.

steps.title: Separate topic from cause
steps.content: Choice A is unsupported because neither text discusses first artifacts. Choice C names drought, which appears only in Text 2 as a proposed cause. Choice D shifts to the causes of the Little Ice Age, not the shared research topic. Both texts focus on the settlers' departure. The answer is B.
